panels.text: [resolute] Everyone is building with AI. [pause] No one is building together.
[grounded] It starts here — not in a training room. [pause] With real, hands-on practice.
[deliberate] Integration isn't a tool decision. [pause] It's a conversation HR has to convene.
[building intensity] Who will we need? What changes in every role? [pause] Who manages the machines?
[confident] New roles. Updated requisites. [pause] Managers who lead people and machines.
[resolute] This is the work HR was built for. [pause] [emphatic] Let's begin.
